metadata.purpose: DB-load staging for M15-BOUNDARY VCG cleanup.

vcg_creations.label: Boundary — reasoned disputation as inner-faculty engagement
vcg_creations.context_description: Jude 9: Michael contending with the devil in disputation about the body of Moses. The dialegō here is the form taken by contested engagement between spiritual beings — reasoned disputation as the mode of serious inner-faculty engagement even in angelic conflict. P-status: borderline.

anchor_proposed.anchor_rationale: Michael does not presume to pronounce judgment but engages in reasoned disputation (dialegō) — the form of serious inner-faculty engagement. Boundary case: the subject is angelic, and the phenomenon is at the edge of M15's scope.

setasides.context_description: Legal determination (diaginōskō, Acts); extended talking causing Eutychus to fall asleep (dialegō, borderline); name translation (methermēneuō); arbitrator role declined by Jesus (meristēs).
